name: docker-metadata-action
description: GitHub Action to extract metadata (tags, labels) for Docker without GitHub API dependencies

scripts.release: standard-version --release-as patch && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:patch: npm run package && standard-version --release-as patch && (V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add dist/ && git commit --amend --no-edit && git tag -f v$V) && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:minor: npm run package && standard-version --release-as minor && (V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add dist/ && git commit --amend --no-edit && git tag -f v$V) && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:major: npm run package && standard-version --release-as major && (V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add dist/ && git commit --amend --no-edit && git tag -f v$V) && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:pre-alpha: standard-version --prerelease alpha && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:pre-beta: standard-version --prerelease beta && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:pre-rc: standard-version --prerelease rc && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD
scripts.release:pre-dev: standard-version --prerelease patch --prereleaseId dev && git push --follow-tags origin HEAD

author: Docker Inc.
